home.meta_title: FuelEcon — Petrol Cost Calculator Australia | Plain-English Fuel Economy
home.meta_description: Work out the real cost of any drive in plain English. FuelEcon shows your fuel use, trip cost, and the easy tweaks that save petrol — for Aussie drivers.
home.vehicle_card_blurb: Don't know your fuel economy? Pick your ute or car from the dropdowns — we'll fill it in.
home.ev_notice_html: ⚡ Driving an EV? Petrol calc doesn't apply — use our EV cost tool.

footer.blurb: Plain-English tools for working out what driving actually costs. Built by drivers, for drivers.
